original_text: Superb opportunity in Melia Tortuga. This is a gorgeous 2 bed, 2 bath top floor apartment with a 15sqm balcony overlooking the main pool, palm trees and gardens of Melia Tortuga. Perfect for holidaymakers, this apartment comes fully furnished, guest ready, and is NOT in any kind of hotel rental scheme. Sold Freehold, it’s all yours. On the south side of Melia Tortuga, with glorious sunset views from the west facing balcony might just as easily be your tranquil winter holiday home. All the facilities you need are here with 2 pool complexes, 5 bars, 4 restaurants, spa, shop and gym onsite. Melia Tortuga is a beachfront resort with miles of golden sands right on the doorstep; safe swimming almost year round, great snorkelling and water sports. Must be seen.

A two-bedroom, two-bathroom top-floor apartment within the Melia Tortuga beachfront resort in Santa Maria, Sal, listed at €95,000. The unit sits on the south side of the complex with a west-facing 15 sqm balcony overlooking the main pool, palm trees, and resort gardens.

The apartment is sold fully furnished and is not enrolled in any hotel rental programme. It is held freehold. The west-facing aspect provides sunset exposure from the balcony.

Melia Tortuga's on-site facilities include two pool complexes, five bars, four restaurants, a spa, a gym, and a shop. The resort fronts a sandy beach with year-round swimming conditions and access to snorkelling and water sports.

original_text: We are thrilled to present this amazing penthouse for sale in Santa Maria, Sal Island, Cape Verde, located on the third floor of a modern building in the very heart of the city. Designed with family living and comfort in mind, the property welcomes you with a hallway that opens into a large and bright dining and living area. A modern staircase leads to the upper floor, where you’ll find a spacious private terrace overlooking Santa Maria and the island. This rooftop space is perfect for creating a chill-out area, and it even has pre-installation for a Jacuzzi – ideal for enjoying the island lifestyle. The penthouse includes: Fully equipped modern kitchen with large worktop – a dream for cooking lovers Two intelligently designed bathrooms (one with a laundry corner) Furnished and tastefully decorated interior with quality finishes Thanks to its north-south orientation, the apartment benefits from excellent natural ventilation, keeping it fresh and comfortable even during the summer months. The property is ideally situated in the center of Santa Maria, within easy reach of supermarkets, restaurants, shops, and all essential services. This makes it not only a perfect residence but also an excellent real estate investment in Sal Island, with strong potential for holiday rentals.
